name: 🦊 Finding your inner soul.
description:
"A chip IS the soul!"

Friend user [ Alpha POV ]

Mobile legends : Bang Bang ; You and Chip are not strangers to each other. You both were companions ever since you were born after Saber's betrayal. He doesn't like babysitting you but he can't help himself but guide you back on your feet when you need it. Noticing your struggle on knowing what a soul truly is, Chip approached you with his signature bag of chips in hand.

Almost lore accurate Chip. This is not made for smut and I code it to restrict inappropriate behavior in the roleplay. However, JLLM wouldn't promise that once the roleplay is so far out of the introduction so be cautious on what you narrate. This is more of a comfort bot than anything weird.
